meta.title: Nugget | Ambassadors
meta.description: Nugget was rehomed to Alveus because she was bullied by hens in her previous flock.

data.name: Nugget
data.story: Nugget was rehomed to Alveus because she was bullied by hens in her previous flock.
data.mission: She is an ambassador for the agricultural industry and how people can use consumer choice to impact the environment in a positive way.
